reviews.comment:
Con esta nueva reapertura, se comprobó que FULL esta a precios razonables y muy buena atención.
El lavadero que antes era un
VERDADERO DESASTRE, AHORA ES MUY BUENO CON PRECIOS ACCESIBLES.
TODO LO DEMÁS PERFECTO COMO SIEMPRE.  Lastima que no hay convenio para sacar o renovar la licencia de conducir.  Siempre falta algo para ser EXCELENTE.

(Translated by Google)
With this reopening, it was confirmed that FULL offers reasonable prices and excellent service.

The car wash, which used to be a complete disaster, is now very good with affordable prices.
Everything else is perfect, as always. It's a shame there's no agreement for obtaining or renewing driver's licenses. There's always something missing to make it truly excellent.
